features.description: Failed Bash in a parallel tool batch no longer cancels sibling calls; each tool returns its own result.
features.reference_changelog_line: Parallel tool calls: a failed Bash command no longer cancels other calls in the same batch — each tool returns its own result independently

features.description: claude mcp list/get/add no longer expands ${VAR} refs and redacts credential headers and URL secrets.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `claude mcp` list/get/add printing secrets to the terminal: `${VAR}` references are no longer expanded, and credential headers and URL secrets are redacted

features.description: OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES values are now attached as labels on metric datapoints for custom slicing.
features.reference_changelog_line: `OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES` values are now included as labels on metric datapoints, so you can slice usage metrics by custom dimensions like team or repo

features.description: claude agents rows now show done/total progress and peek shows the longest-running fanned-out item.
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude agents` rows now show `done/total` before the detail when work is fanned out; peek shows the longest-running item

features.description: /mcp now hides claude.ai connectors never signed in to behind a Show unused connectors row.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/mcp` now collapses claude.ai connectors you've never signed in to behind a "Show unused connectors" row

features.description: Fullscreen clipboard uses wl-copy/xclip/xsel on Linux and copies to clipboard plus PRIMARY selection.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fullscreen mode: clipboard now uses `wl-copy`/`xclip`/`xsel` on Linux when available, copies to both the clipboard and PRIMARY selection for middle-click paste, and the "hold {key} for native selection" hint now shows the correct key per terminal
